message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Step 5 ready for review — clarify + trash">
Step 5 (Clarify as Next Action + Trash, US-GTD-2a) is complete and CI is green. Please review from your area of expertise and send feedback to luca-palmieri.

Key files to review:
- `src/services/inbox_service.rs` — clarify_as_next_action() service function + error type
- `src/routes/inbox.rs` — post_clarify_inbox_item() handler, ClarifyForm, context passing
- `templates/inbox_item.html` — rewritten with clarify form (context select + Next Action button) and trash
- `static/css/main.css` — new clarify/trash styles
- `docs/glossary.md` — updated entries
- `tests/api/inbox.rs` — 6 new integration tests

Remember: BLOCKING / Minor / Nice-to-have categories. Check what others have flagged before writing yours.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Let me review the updated CSS and templates for Step 5.

file.content: • {{ item.title }}

content.text: Let me read the full new CSS section for inbox items.
Now I have the full picture. Let me check if any other reviewers have already flagged CSS/frontend issues before writing my review.

input.summary: CSS review: no blocking, 4 minor consistency fixes, approved

routing.summary: CSS review: no blocking, 4 minor consistency fixes, approved

content.text:
Review sent. **No blocking issues** from the CSS/frontend perspective. Four minor consistency fixes identified:

1. **Opacity hover** -- should use `background-color: var(--color-primary-dark)` like every other primary button
2. **Wrong color token** -- `color: var(--color-bg)` on the clarify button should be `color: white` (would break in dark mode)
3. **Redundant select styles** -- base layer already handles most of the select properties
4. **Wrong background token** -- select uses `var(--color-bg)` instead of `var(--color-bg-raised)`, making it blend into the page background

All are single-property fixes. **Approved** from my end -- standing by for team consensus.
